summary: Story Video Studio - Templates, Waiting Games, Sharing & Beta Tester Guide Testing Complete (Iteration 128). Fixed route ordering bug where /my-videos was returning 404 because dynamic /{template_id} route was catching it. All 12 backend tests now pass.
critical_code_review_comments: story_video_templates.py: Fixed route ordering - /my-videos and /video-ready/{job_id} now placed BEFORE dynamic /{template_id} route
story_video_templates.py: Minor lint warnings (F841, F541) for unused variable and f-strings without placeholders - not affecting functionality
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Story Video Studio template endpoints verified working. Route ordering bug fixed - specific routes must be defined before dynamic /{template_id} route in FastAPI.

verified_endpoints.GET /api/story-video-studio/templates/li: PASS - Returns 8 templates: bedtime_adventure, superhero_origin, fairy_tale, space_explorer, friendship_story, educational_journey, animal_adventure, mystery_detective
verified_endpoints.GET /api/story-video-studio/templates/wa: PASS - Returns games(5), trivia_count(10), puzzles_count(10), riddles_count(10)
PASS - Returns exactly 3 trivia questions with id, question, options (no answer)
PASS - Returns scrambled word, hint, length (no answer)
verified_endpoints.POST /api/story-video-studio/templates/s: PASS - Returns share links for facebook, twitter, whatsapp, linkedin, email
verified_endpoints.GET /api/story-video-studio/templates/my: PASS - Returns user's completed videos list (was 404 before fix)
verified_endpoints.GET /api/story-video-studio/templates/be: PASS - Returns 8-step testing guide with feedback questions

bug_fixed.description: Route ordering bug - /my-videos endpoint was returning 404 'Template not found'
bug_fixed.root_cause: Dynamic route /{template_id} was defined before /my-videos in the FastAPI router, causing 'my-videos' to be treated as a template_id
bug_fixed.fix_applied: Moved /my-videos and /video-ready/{job_id} endpoints before the dynamic /{template_id} route
